nodes.context: Predominantly Mexican American street gang in Boyle Heights, East Los Angeles.
Hispanic gang, rival of White Fence.
Prison gang, ally of White Fence.
Alliance of gangs, some sets allied with White Fence.
Gang, territorial rival of White Fence.
Gang, territorial rival of White Fence.
Gang that originally derived from Varrio White Fence.

edges.evidence_quote: The rivalry between the gang and another Hispanic gang, El Hoyo Maravilla, is one of the longest, ongoing feuds in all of Los Angeles, a rivalry going back to the 1930s.
edges.context: White Fence and El Hoyo Maravilla have a long-standing rivalry.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia , Sureños (some other sets)
edges.context: Mexican Mafia is an ally of White Fence.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia , Sureños (some other sets)
edges.context: Some Sureños sets are allies of White Fence.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: All Maravilla sets, Varrio Nuevo Estrada , Armenian Power , others flats gangs
edges.context: Varrio Nuevo Estrada is a rival of White Fence.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: All Maravilla sets, Varrio Nuevo Estrada , Armenian Power , others flats gangs
edges.context: Armenian Power is a rival of White Fence.

edges.evidence_quote: White Fence has pushed itself into many territory-based beefs ... engaging in territorial beefs with neighborhoods like Tiny Boys X3 (TBS), KAMSTERS X3 (KAM), Armernian Power X3 (APX3), and many other gangs
edges.context: White Fence has territorial conflicts with Tiny Boys X3.

edges.evidence_quote: White Fence has pushed itself into many territory-based beefs ... engaging in territorial beefs with neighborhoods like Tiny Boys X3 (TBS), KAMSTERS X3 (KAM), Armernian Power X3 (APX3), and many other gangs
edges.context: White Fence has territorial conflicts with KAMSTERS X3.

edges.evidence_quote: gangs such as the Avenues (AVES), Frogtown (FTR), Hazard (BH), and other sections in the area originally derived from Varrio White Fence.
edges.context: The Avenues gang originally derived from Varrio White Fence.
